text:
was a noble and ruffian living in Shiganshina District.

Appearance

Diedrich had small, sleepy looking eyes and was always seen with a grin on his face. He also had short hair with a wide nose.

Personality

Diedrich was an immoral ruffian who would prey upon young women with his friend Pechstein and associate Michael Pottering. He had no qualms about assaulting women in broad daylight, even if others were nearby.

Story

Underground City arc

Diedrich gets wind that his associate Michael is smitten with a young noblewoman named Sharle Inocencio. Along with his friend Pechstein, Diedrich persuades Michael to invite her out and get her away from her brother. As the two drive past the headquarters of the Military Police, Diedrich and Pechstein stop the carriage and force themselves on Sharle. He grabs Sharle and starts licking his lips, telling her that no one will hear her scream. As the carriage hits a bump, Sharle punches Diedrich in the groin and escapes out into the street. They chase after her and try telling the MP guards that Sharle had an argument with their friend. Diedrich tries getting her to leave, but is bitten on the hand; the guards immediately get Diedrich and Pechstein on the ground after they attempt to assault her. Gloria Bernhart comes out and has the two arrested and sent for interrogation.

At some point, Sharle's brother Xavi hears about what had happened and arranges for the two to be executed for trying to rape his sister.
